remember: Students will be able to recall the key features of the poem 'Going Places' by Kamala Das.
Students will be able to identify the tone and mood of the poem.
Students will be able to describe the poet's attitude towards her journey.
understand: Students will be able to explain the poet's emotions and thoughts as expressed in the poem.
Students will be able to analyze the role of imagery in creating the poem's atmosphere.
Students will be able to identify the poet's use of symbolism and its significance.
apply: Students will be able to apply the understanding of the poem to real-life situations.
Students will be able to evaluate the poet's use of language to convey her message.
Students will be able to use the poem to support their own thoughts and opinions.
analyze: Students will be able to analyze the poet's use of literary devices to convey her emotions and thoughts.
Students will be able to compare and contrast the poet's journey with their own experiences.
Students will be able to evaluate the poet's message and its relevance to contemporary society.

ncert_objectives: As per NCERT objective 1: To understand the poem 'Going Places' by Kamala Das and analyze its tone, mood, and symbolism.
As per NCERT objective 2: To evaluate the poet's use of language and literary devices to convey her message.
board_exam_objectives: To analyze the poet's emotions and thoughts as expressed in the poem 'Going Places' by Kamala Das.
To evaluate the role of imagery in creating the poem's atmosphere and its impact on the reader.
To identify the poet's use of symbolism and its significance in the poem.
